mcq:
What letter comes after K?
a) J b) L c) M d) N

Which of these is a consonant?
a) A b) E c) M d) I
short: Write the letters from K to P
What is the capital letter of 'k'?

mcq:
We cook food in the:
a) Bedroom b) Kitchen c) Bathroom d) Garden

We sleep in the:
a) Kitchen b) Living room c) Bedroom d) Bathroom
tf: The living room is for relaxing. [True/False]
short: What do you do in the living room?

mcq:
I _____ to school every day.
a) go b) goes c) going d) went

She _____ apples.
a) like b) likes c) liking d) liked
tf: They go to school on Sunday. [True/False]
short: Change to negative: She reads books

mcq:
A person who teaches students is a:
a) Doctor b) Teacher c) Engineer d) Farmer

A person who treats sick people is a:
a) Teacher b) Doctor c) Pilot d) Driver

Yesterday I _____ to the park.
a) go b) goes c) went d) going

She _____ a book last night.
a) read b) reads c) reading d) readed
short: Make a sentence in past simple

mcq:
Turn _____ to go north.
a) Left b) Right c) Straight d) Back

The opposite of 'up' is:
a) Left b) Right c) Down d) Forward
tf: Turn left means to go to the left side. [True/False]

mcq:
We travel by _____ in the sky.
a) Car b) Train c) Plane d) Bus

A _____ runs on rails.
a) Bus b) Car c) Train d) Boat
short: How do you go to school?

mcq:
The opposite of 'big' is:
a) Large b) Small c) Tall d) Long

The sun is very:
a) Cold b) Hot c) Dark d) Wet
